title: aster granulosus
intro: Aster granulosus, also known as the starry or mountain aster, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Aster granulosus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Aster granulosus include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
